title: KnowledgeEdge
description: A directed, typed relationship between two RoseNodes in the knowledge graph.

from.description: ActionHash of the source RoseNode (base39 encoded)

to.description: ActionHash of the target RoseNode (base39 encoded)

relationship.description: Semantic relationship type from the manifesto ontology

confidence.description: Signed gradient in [-1.0, +1.0]: negative = away from truth, 0 = neutral, positive = toward truth
